retrieved_result: Economic Definition of subsidy. Defined. Share This Article: Economic Definition of subsidy. Offline Version: PDFTerm subsidy Definition: A payment from government to individuals or businesses without any expectations of production. The best way of thinking about a subsidy is as a negative tax. Government extends subsidies for man
